title: The Flatwoods Monster: A Legacy of Fear
original_title: The Flatwoods Monster: A Legacy of Fear
overview: Unlock a decades-old mystery that included a government-ordered military examination of a purported alien crash-site, and multiple UFOs seen by countless residents of Braxton County, West Virginia.
